Class Node

java.lang.Object
configs.Node
public class Node extends Object
Represents a single node in the rendered runtime graph. Nodes model either topics or agents and keep outgoing edges plus optional message metadata used by the visualization layer.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    Node.Kind
    Identifies the semantic type of a graph node.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Node(String name)
    Creates a node whose internal and display names are the same.
    Node(String name, String displayName, Node.Kind kind)
    Creates a node with explicit internal name, display name, and kind.

  • Constructor Details

    • Node

      public Node(String name)
      Creates a node whose internal and display names are the same.
      Parameters:
      name - the internal and display name of the node

    • Node

      public Node(String name, String displayName, Node.Kind kind)
      Creates a node with explicit internal name, display name, and kind.
      Parameters:
      name - the internal node identifier
      displayName - the label shown in rendered output
      kind - the semantic node type

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the internal node name.
      Returns:
      the internal node identifier

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Updates the internal node name.
      Parameters:
      name - the new internal node identifier

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Returns the display label for the node.
      Returns:
      the display label

    • setDisplayName

      public void setDisplayName(String displayName)
      Updates the display label for the node.
      Parameters:
      displayName - the new display label

    • getKind

      public Node.Kind getKind()
      Returns the node kind.
      Returns:
      the semantic node type

    • setKind

      public void setKind(Node.Kind kind)
      Updates the node kind.
      Parameters:
      kind - the new semantic node type

    • getEdges

      public List<Node> getEdges()
      Returns the outgoing edges of this node.
      Returns:
      the list of adjacent destination nodes

    • setEdges

      public void setEdges(List<Node> edges)
      Replaces the outgoing edges of this node.
      Parameters:
      edges - the new list of outgoing edges

    • getMessage

      public Message getMessage()
      Returns the message associated with this node, if any.
      Returns:
      the attached message, or null if none is set

    • setMessage

      public void setMessage(Message message)
      Associates a message with this node.
      Parameters:
      message - the message to attach

    • addEdge

      public void addEdge(Node n)
      Adds an outgoing edge from this node to the supplied destination.
      Parameters:
      n - the destination node

    • hasCycles

      public boolean hasCycles()
      Determines whether this node participates in a directed cycle.
      Returns:
      true if a cycle is reachable from this node; otherwise false
